title: Run
why_this_song: Run by Snow Patrol (2003) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: As if you have a choice
Even if you cannot hear my voice
I can hardly speak I understand
Why you can't raise your voice to say
To think I might not see those eyes

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "light" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "light" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "voice" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "voice" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'll sing it one last time for you
And we'll run for our lives
I can hardly speak I understand

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Then we really have to go
To get out of our little heads

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Run", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Run", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Run" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Run" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Run" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Run", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
